extension.summary: Manage and safely retain Radarr and Sonarr media from Kodi.
extension.description: Kodi-native status, search, monitoring, queue and destructive controls, with watched/added-age retention preview, manual cleanup and optional dry-run-first periodic cleanup for Radarr movies and Sonarr episode files.
extension.news: Add watched and added-age retention preview, PIN-authorised API cleanup, and optional dry-run-first scheduled cleanup for movies and episode files.
